features.claim: Antigravity's agent generates an implementation plan artifact that details the technical revisions needed to accomplish a coding task, for user review before changes are made.
features.name: Implementation Plan
features.quote: Agent utilizes the implementation plan artifact to architect changes within your codebase to accomplish a task. These plans contain technical details on what revisions are necessary and are meant to be reviewed by the user.

features.claim: Users can configure a review policy (e.g. 'Always Proceed') to control whether the agent pauses for approval before executing a plan.
features.name: artifact review policy
features.quote: Unless you have your artifact review policy set to "Always Proceed", Agent will typically request your review on the implementation plan before making the changes needed to complete your task.

features.claim: Users can leave inline comments on an implementation plan artifact to provide feedback — such as reducing scope, changing tech stack, or correcting discrepancies — before the agent proceeds.
features.name: commenting on artifacts
features.quote: Antigravity supports commenting on these artifacts so you can provide feedback to Agent for any reason, whether it be to decrease scope of changes, use a different tech stack, or correct any Agent discrepancies.

features.claim: A 'Review' button in the artifact header lets users consolidate all comments into a message as feedback to the agent instead of directly proceeding with the plan.
features.name: Review button
features.quote: You can also toggle the "Review" button in the artifact header, where you can examine all comments and leave a message as feedback instead of directly proceeding, if needed.
